channel.title: FreeToolz - Free Online Tools & Utilities
channel.description: Recent content on FreeToolz - Free Online Tools & Utilities

item.title: Data Storage Explained: From Bytes to Terabytes
item.description:
We live in a world of data. Your phone has 128 GB, your hard drive is 2 TB, your internet speed is measured in Mbps, and your files are counted in MB. But what do these units actually mean? How many photos fit in a gigabyte? Is a kilobyte bigger than a megabyte? And what’s the difference between a gigabyte and a gibibyte?

This guide breaks down data storage units from the smallest bit to the largest terabyte, with real-world comparisons that make sense.

item.title: Discount Calculator Guide: Never Overpay Again — Smart Shopping Guide
item.description:
Every shopper has felt it — the excitement of a “50% off” sign, only to wonder later if you actually got a good deal. Discounts can be deceptive. A store can mark up the original price, stack confusing terms, or use psychological tricks to make you feel like you’re saving more than you are.

This guide teaches you exactly how discounts work, how to calculate them in seconds, and how to spot the difference between a genuine deal and clever marketing.

item.title: Speed Conversion: KMH to MPH and Everything in Between
item.description:
Speed limits, car dashboards, weather reports, and aviation all use different units of speed depending on where you are in the world. If you’ve ever rented a car abroad, tracked a hurricane, or wondered how fast mach 1 really is, you’ve needed a speed conversion.

This guide covers the four main speed units — KMH, MPH, knots, and mach — with formulas, mental math shortcuts, and real-world examples that make conversions second nature.

item.title: Tip Calculator Guide: Splitting Bills Fairly at Restaurants
item.description:
Dining out with friends or family should end with a great meal, not an awkward argument over the bill. Yet splitting a restaurant check is one of the most common social friction points — someone always ends up paying more than their fair share, and tip math can get confusing when everyone’s order is different.

This guide covers tipping customs around the world, smart bill-splitting strategies, and how to calculate tips and per-person totals in seconds.

item.title: Unit Conversion Guide: How to Convert Length, Mass & Temperature
item.description:
Whether you’re cooking a foreign recipe, planning a road trip, shipping a package, or working on a DIY project, converting between measurement units is something everyone faces. Metric and imperial systems coexist in daily life — and switching between them shouldn’t require a math degree.

This guide covers the most common conversions for length, mass, and temperature, with quick reference tables you can bookmark and come back to.

Length Conversion

Length is the most frequently converted measurement. From measuring furniture to calculating travel distances, here’s everything you need.

item.title: CCTV System Planning Guide: Storage, Bandwidth, PoE & More
item.description:
Planning a CCTV security system involves more than just buying cameras and mounting them on walls. A professional-grade installation requires precise calculations across storage, power, network bandwidth, and backup systems. Get these wrong, and you’ll face recording gaps, switch overloads, or cameras going offline when you need them most.

This guide covers the essential calculations every installer needs — with free tools to do the math instantly.

1. Storage Planning: How Much Hard Drive Space Do You Need?

Storage is the most common miscalculation in CCTV systems. Nothing is worse than discovering your NVR only retains 3 days of footage when you need to review something from a week ago.

item.title: MOI Approved CCTV System Planning Guide 2026 — Compliance & Calculations
item.description:
Installing a CCTV system in Qatar isn’t just about buying cameras and mounting them on walls. The Ministry of Interior (MOI) Security Systems Department (SSD) enforces strict technical standards that every business must meet — from camera resolution and storage retention to RAID configuration and power backup.

This guide walks through every technical requirement for MOI SSD compliance, shows you how to plan your system using free tools, and explains the step-by-step approval process.

item.title: ROI Calculator Guide: How to Measure Return on Investment the Right Way
item.description:
Return on Investment (ROI) is the most widely used financial metric for a reason — it tells you, in a single percentage, whether your money or effort was well spent. But calculating it correctly matters. A flawed ROI number can lead to bad decisions, whether you’re evaluating a stock, a marketing campaign, or a equipment purchase.

This guide covers the ROI formula, common variations like annualized ROI, real-world examples, and the mistakes that trip up even experienced investors.

item.title: Color Picker: How to Choose the Perfect Color for Your Design
item.description:
Color is one of the most powerful tools in a designer’s arsenal. Whether you’re building a website, creating a logo, or designing a UI, choosing the right colors can make or break your project. Our free color picker makes it easy to find and copy color codes instantly.

What Is a Color Picker?

A color picker is a tool that lets you select colors visually and get their exact values in various formats. Instead of guessing hex codes or RGB values, you can point, click, and copy the color you need.

item.title: EMI Calculator: Understanding Loan Payments and Amortization
item.description:
EMI stands for Equated Monthly Installment — the fixed amount you pay each month to repay a loan. Whether you’re taking a home loan, car loan, or personal loan, understanding how EMIs work helps you make better borrowing decisions.

What Is EMI?

An EMI is a fixed monthly payment made by a borrower to a lender until the loan is fully paid off. Each EMI payment covers both the principal amount and the interest due for that month.

item.title: Meta Tags for SEO: A Complete Guide to Writing Better Meta Tags
item.description:
Meta tags are HTML elements that provide information about your web page to search engines and social media platforms. They’re not visible on the page itself but appear in the HTML source code. Well-written meta tags can significantly improve your search rankings and click-through rates.

Why Meta Tags Matter for SEO

Meta tags serve as your page’s first impression in search results. The meta title and description are what users see when your page appears on Google, Bing, or other search engines. A compelling meta description can be the difference between someone clicking your link or a competitor’s.

item.title: The Power of Compound Interest: How Your Money Grows Over Time
item.description:
Compound interest is often called the “eighth wonder of the world.” Albert Einstein reportedly said, “He who understands it, earns it; he who doesn’t, pays it.” But what exactly is compound interest, and why is it so powerful?

What Is Compound Interest?

Compound interest is interest calculated on both your initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods. Unlike simple interest — which only pays interest on your original amount — compound interest creates a snowball effect where your money grows faster over time.

item.title: 30 Free Online Tools for Everyday Tasks
item.description:
Looking for a free online tool to get something done fast? You’ve come to the right place. Our collection of 30 free tools covers everything from text processing to construction estimates — all running entirely in your browser with zero server uploads.

Text Tools

Working with text is something we all do daily. Our text tools make it effortless:

  • Word Counter — Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in any text
  • Case Converter — Switch between uppercase, lowercase, title case, and sentence case instantly
  • Markdown Editor — Write markdown with live preview
  • Text Diff Checker — Compare two texts and spot differences at a glance
  • URL Encoder/Decoder — Encode text for URLs or decode URL-encoded strings
  • Base64 Encoder/Decoder — Convert text to Base64 and back

All tools work in real-time as you type, with no page reloads.

item.title: BMI Calculator: What Your Body Mass Index Means
item.description:
Body Mass Index (BMI) is a simple measurement that uses your height and weight to estimate body fat. It’s a screening tool used by healthcare providers worldwide. But what does your BMI number actually mean, and how accurate is it?

What Is BMI?

BMI stands for Body Mass Index. It’s calculated by dividing your weight in kilograms by your height in meters squared. The result places you into one of four main categories: underweight, normal weight, overweight, or obese.

item.title: Daily Water Intake Calculator: How Much to Drink
item.description:
You’ve probably heard “drink eight glasses of water a day.” But the truth is, your optimal water intake depends on your body weight, how active you are, and even the climate you live in.

Why Hydration Matters

Water makes up about 60% of your body weight. It’s essential for regulating body temperature, lubricating joints, transporting nutrients, flushing waste, and maintaining cognitive function.

Even mild dehydration — losing just 1-2% of your body’s water — can cause fatigue, headaches, and reduced concentration.

item.title: Concrete Calculator: Volume Estimator Guide
item.description:
Ordering concrete is one of the most stressful parts of any construction project. Too little means a cold joint and a weak slab. Too much means wasted money and disposal fees. Here’s how to get it right.

Why Accurate Concrete Estimation Matters

Concrete is typically sold by the cubic yard (in the US) or cubic meter (elsewhere). A single cubic yard of concrete weighs about 4,000 pounds, so you can’t just eyeball it. Accurate estimation:

item.title: How to Create Strong Passwords: Security Guide
item.description:
Weak passwords are the number one cause of account breaches. Every year, millions of accounts are compromised because people use passwords like “123456,” “password,” or “qwerty.” Here’s how to create passwords that are actually secure.

What Makes a Password Strong?

A strong password has three key characteristics: it’s long (at least 12 characters, ideally 16+), complex (uses a mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols), and unique (never reused across accounts).

item.title: JSON vs YAML: Which Data Format Should You Use?
item.description:
JSON and YAML are the two most popular data serialization formats in modern software development. Both store structured data, but they excel in different scenarios.

What Is JSON?

JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data interchange format that’s easy for machines to parse and generate. It’s the standard for APIs, configuration files in JavaScript ecosystems, and data storage.

{"name": "My App", "version": "2.0.0", "dependencies": ["express", "react"], "config": {"port": 3000, "debug": true}}

What Is YAML?

YAML (YAML Ain’t Markup Language) uses indentation to denote structure. It’s commonly used for configuration files in DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and applications where humans edit files directly.

item.title: BMR Calculator: Calorie & Metabolism Guide
item.description:
If you’re trying to lose weight, build muscle, or simply maintain your current weight, understanding your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and daily calorie needs is essential.

What Is BMR?

BMR stands for Basal Metabolic Rate — the number of calories your body burns at complete rest just to maintain basic functions like breathing, circulation, and cell production. It accounts for about 60-75% of your total daily energy expenditure.

What Is the Mifflin-St Jeor Equation?

The most accurate formula for estimating BMR is the Mifflin-St Jeor equation. Our BMR calculator uses this formula:

item.title: Roofing Calculator: Estimate Shingles & Materials
item.description:
Replacing a roof is one of the most expensive home improvements. Accurate material estimation saves money and prevents project delays. Here’s how to calculate everything you need.

Understanding Roof Measurements

Roofing materials are measured in “squares.” One square equals 100 square feet of roof surface. A typical 2,000 square foot home needs about 20-25 squares of roofing.

How Roof Pitch Affects Area

Roof pitch is the angle of your roof, expressed as rise over run (e.g., 6/12 means the roof rises 6 inches for every 12 inches of horizontal run).

item.title: Due Date Calculator: Pregnancy & Trimester Guide
item.description:
Finding out your due date is one of the first and most exciting milestones of pregnancy. But how exactly is it calculated, and how accurate is it?

How Due Dates Are Calculated

The standard method is Naegele’s Rule, which estimates the due date as 40 weeks (280 days) from the first day of your last menstrual period (LMP).

Formula: LMP date + 280 days = estimated due date

If you know your conception date, the due date is approximately 266 days (38 weeks) from conception.

item.title: QR Code Generator: Create QR Codes for Free
item.description:
QR codes are everywhere — restaurant menus, business cards, product packaging, and advertisements. They provide a frictionless way to connect physical objects with digital content.

What Is a QR Code?

QR stands for “Quick Response.” These two-dimensional barcodes can be scanned by any smartphone camera to instantly open a URL, display text, or trigger an action. Unlike traditional barcodes, QR codes can be scanned from any angle.

How to Create a QR Code

Creating a QR code takes seconds with our QR code generator:

item.title: Paint Calculator: Estimate Gallons for Any Room
item.description:
Nothing is more frustrating than running out of paint halfway through a room — or ending up with five gallons of unused paint. Here’s how to calculate exactly what you need.

The Basic Formula

To estimate paint, you need to know the surface area and the paint’s coverage rate. Most paint covers about 350-400 square feet per gallon.

Wall area: Measure the perimeter of the room and multiply by the ceiling height. Then subtract windows and doors.

item.title: Body Fat Percentage Guide: Measure & Understand
item.description:
BMI is a useful screening tool, but body fat percentage gives you a much more accurate picture of your body composition. Two people with the same BMI can have very different body fat levels.

What Is Body Fat Percentage?

Body fat percentage is the proportion of your total weight that comes from fat tissue. The remaining weight comes from muscle, bone, organs, and water.

Unlike BMI, body fat percentage directly measures body composition, making it a better indicator of health and fitness.

item.title: About FreeToolz
item.description:
What Is FreeToolz?

FreeToolz is a collection of free online tools designed to help you get things done quickly. From health calculators to developer utilities, every tool runs entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded to any server.

Why We Built This

We noticed that most “free” tools online are cluttered with ads, require signups, or limit what you can do unless you pay. FreeToolz is different:

  • No signup required — just open and use
  • No server uploads — everything runs in your browser
  • No artificial limits — use tools as much as you want
  • 100% free — no hidden charges, no premium tiers

What You’ll Find

  • Health Calculators — BMI, BMR, calorie, body fat, water intake
  • Developer Tools — JSON formatter, SQL formatter, hash generator, minifiers
  • Construction Calculators — concrete, brick, paint, roofing, rebar
  • CCTV & Security — bandwidth, storage, PoE, UPS calculators
  • Finance Tools — EMI, compound interest, ROI, discount calculator
  • Text & Conversion Tools — case converter, unit converter, URL encoder
  • SEO Tools — meta tag generator, keyword density checker, sitemap generator

Our Values

Privacy first. We don’t collect your data. Every tool runs client-side.

item.title: Age Calculator - Calculate Exact Age in Years, Months & Days Free
item.description:
How to Use the Age Calculator

  1. Enter your date of birth — select day, month, and year
  2. Choose a reference date — defaults to today
  3. View exact age — years, months, days, hours, minutes, and seconds

Also shows age on any specific date. Perfect for age verification, milestone tracking, or just curiosity.

Features

  • Exact age — years, months, days, hours, minutes, seconds
  • Any reference date — calculate age on any past or future date
  • Auto-updating — seconds tick in real-time
  • Next birthday — days until your next birthday
  • Age in months/days/weeks — additional breakdowns

item.title: Area & Volume Calculator - Geometry Calculator Free
item.description:
How to Use the Area & Volume Calculator

  1. Choose shape — square, rectangle, circle, triangle for area; cube, sphere, cylinder, cone for volume
  2. Enter dimensions — fill in the required measurements
  3. Get result — area or volume calculated instantly

Perfect for students, DIY enthusiasts, construction workers, and anyone needing quick geometry calculations.

Features

  • Area shapes — square, rectangle, circle, triangle, parallelogram, trapezoid
  • Volume solids — cube, rectangular prism, sphere, cylinder, cone
  • Multiple units — mm, cm, m, inches, feet
  • Formula display — shows the formula used
  • Real-time — updates as you type dimensions

item.title: Area Converter - Free Online Area Conversion Tool
item.description:
How to Use the Area Converter

  1. Enter value — type the area you want to convert
  2. Select from unit — choose the source unit
  3. Select to unit — choose the target unit
  4. Get result — instant conversion

Perfect for real estate, construction, gardening, and land measurement.

Features

  • 10+ units — m², km², ha, acre, ft², mi², yd², and more
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Two-way — swap units for reverse conversion
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Bandwidth Calculator - Network Bandwidth for IP Cameras Free
item.description:
How to Use the Bandwidth Calculator

  1. Enter number of cameras on your network
  2. Select resolution — 2MP to 12MP
  3. Choose frame rate and compression — H.264, H.265, or H.265+
  4. Get total bandwidth in Mbps and recommended connection speed

Perfect for network engineers, CCTV installers, and IT professionals designing IP surveillance networks.

Features

  • Per-camera bitrate — bandwidth estimate for each camera
  • Total system bandwidth — aggregate for all cameras
  • Network recommendations — 100Mbps vs 1000Mbps suitability
  • Compression comparison — see savings with H.265
  • Multiple resolutions — 2MP (1080p) through 12MP (4K)

item.title: Bandwidth Converter - Mbps Gbps MB/s Converter Free
item.description:
How to Use the Bandwidth Converter

  1. Enter a value — type any number
  2. Select the unit — choose from Mbps, Gbps, Kbps, MB/s, GB/s, KB/s
  3. View all conversions — instantly see the equivalent in every unit

Perfect for network engineers, CCTV installers, and IT professionals comparing bandwidth requirements across different units.

Features

  • All common units — Kbps, Mbps, Gbps, Tbps, KB/s, MB/s, GB/s, TB/s
  • Real-time conversion — updates as you type or change units
  • Bidirectional — bits and bytes (capital B = bytes, lowercase b = bits)
  • Precision — accurate to 4 decimal places
  • Copy results — one-click copy for any converted value

item.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder - Encode & Decode Base64 Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Base64 Encoder/Decoder

  1. Type or paste your text in the input area
  2. Click Encode to convert to Base64, or Decode to convert back
  3. Copy the result with one click

All processing happens in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.

Features

  • Encode — convert plain text to Base64
  • Decode — convert Base64 back to readable text
  • Copy result — one-click copy to clipboard
  • 100% private — everything runs in your browser

item.title: BMI Calculator - Calculate Body Mass Index Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the BMI Calculator

  1. Enter your weight — in pounds or kilograms
  2. Enter your height — in feet/inches or centimeters
  3. Get instant BMI — see your score and category

Understand your BMI category: Underweight (<18.5), Normal (18.5-24.9), Overweight (25-29.9), or Obese (30+). All calculations happen in your browser — nothing is saved or uploaded.

Features

  • Instant calculation — updates as you type
  • Dual units — imperial (lbs/ft) and metric (kg/cm)
  • BMI categories — color-coded results
  • Healthy weight range — shows ideal weight for your height
  • Visual indicator — gauge-style display

item.title: BMR Calculator - Calculate Basal Metabolic Rate Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the BMR Calculator

  1. Enter your details — weight, height, age, gender
  2. Get your BMR — calories burned at rest
  3. See maintenance calories — based on activity level

Your BMR is the number of calories your body burns at complete rest. Use this to plan your diet and fitness goals. All data stays in your browser.

Features

  • Mifflin-St Jeor equation — most accurate BMR formula
  • Activity levels — from sedentary to very active
  • Maintenance calories — BMR × activity multiplier
  • Dual units — imperial and metric
  • Weight management — bulk/cut calorie targets

item.title: Body Fat Calculator - Estimate Body Fat Percentage Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Body Fat Calculator

  1. Select method — US Navy (most accurate) or simple BMI-based
  2. Enter measurements — based on the method chosen
  3. Get body fat % — see your estimated body fat and category

The US Navy method uses neck, waist, and hip measurements for the most accurate estimate. All data stays in your browser.

Features

  • US Navy method — most accurate estimation formula
  • BMI-based — quick estimate if measurements aren’t available
  • Body fat categories — essential, athlete, fitness, average, obese
  • Dual units — imperial and metric
  • Visual gauge — see where you fall on the scale

item.title: Brick Calculator - Calculate Number of Bricks or Blocks Needed
item.description:
How to Use the Brick Calculator

  1. Enter wall dimensions — length and height
  2. Choose brick type — modular, queen, king, or custom
  3. Set mortar joint — standard 3/8" or custom
  4. Get count — number of bricks plus mortar estimate

Perfect for masons, contractors, and DIY brickwork projects. All calculations done in your browser.

Features

  • Multiple brick types — modular, queen, king, utility, custom
  • Block option — CMU block sizes available
  • Mortar estimate — cubic feet of mortar needed
  • Waste allowance — includes 10% for breakage
  • Paver mode — for patios and walkways

item.title: Calorie Calculator - Daily Calorie Intake for Weight Goals
item.description:
How to Use the Calorie Calculator

  1. Enter your stats — age, weight, height, gender
  2. Select activity level — how active you are
  3. Choose your goal — lose, maintain, or gain weight
  4. Get your numbers — daily calories + macro split

Understand exactly how many calories you need daily and how to split them between protein, carbs, and fat. All data stays in your browser.

Features

  • Mifflin-St Jeor BMR — science-based calculation
  • Weight goals — lose 0.5/1 lb per week, maintain, or gain
  • Macronutrient breakdown — protein, carbs, fat in grams
  • Dual units — imperial and metric
  • Visual pie chart — see your macro split

item.title: Camera FOV Calculator - Lens Field of View Calculator Free
item.description:
How to Use the FOV Calculator

  1. Select sensor size — 1/3", 1/2.7", 1/2", or 1/1.8"
  2. Enter focal length — lens focal length in mm (2.8 to 12mm typical)
  3. Enter distance — distance to target in meters
  4. Get instant results — horizontal FOV, vertical FOV, and coverage area

Perfect for security system designers, CCTV installers, and surveillance professionals planning camera placement and lens selection.

Features

  • Common sensor sizes — 1/3", 1/2.7", 1/2.5", 1/1.8"
  • Focal length range — 2.0mm to 50mm
  • Coverage area — width and height at target distance
  • Visual reference — shows coverage pattern
  • Lens recommendations — suggests lens for desired coverage

item.title: Case Converter - Convert Text to Uppercase, Lowercase & More Free
item.description:
How to Use the Case Converter

  1. Type or paste your text in the input box
  2. Click a case option — UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, or tOGGLE cASE
  3. Copy the result instantly

All processing is done locally in your browser.

Features

  • UPPERCASE — convert all text to capital letters
  • lowercase — convert all text to small letters
  • Title Case — capitalize the first letter of each word
  • Sentence case — capitalize only the first letter of each sentence
  • tOGGLE cASE — reverse the case of each letter
  • One-click copy — copy result to clipboard

item.title: CCTV Storage Calculator - Calculate Recording Days & HDD Size Free
item.description: Planning a video surveillance system requires precision, especially when it comes to hard drive capacity. The FreeToolz CCTV Storage Calculator is a professional estimator designed for security installers, IT managers, and home users. It helps you determine exactly how much disk space your NVR or DVR will need based on camera specifications and your required retention period. Avoid the “disk full” errors and ensure your critical footage is always preserved.

item.title: Color Picker - Pick Colors Online, Hex RGB HSL Converter Free
item.description:
How to Use the Color Picker

  1. Click or drag on the color area to pick a color
  2. Adjust with sliders to fine-tune your selection
  3. Copy the HEX, RGB, or HSL values with one click

All processing happens in your browser. No data is sent anywhere.

Features

  • Visual color picker — click anywhere on the gradient to pick
  • HEX, RGB, HSL — see and copy all color formats
  • Color preview — large preview of selected color
  • One-click copy — copy any color value to clipboard

item.title: Compound Interest Calculator - Free Online Interest Calculator
item.description:
How to Use the Compound Interest Calculator

  1. Enter principal — starting amount
  2. Set interest rate — annual percentage rate
  3. Choose time period — number of years
  4. Toggle compounding — simple or compound interest
  5. Get results — final balance, total interest, and yearly breakdown

Perfect for investment planning, savings goals, and understanding the power of compounding.

Features

  • Simple & Compound — toggle between both modes
  • Yearly breakdown — see how your money grows each year
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Concrete Calculator - Calculate Yards, Cubic Feet & Bags Needed
item.description:
How to Use the Concrete Calculator

  1. Select shape — slab (rectangle), column (cylinder), or footing
  2. Enter dimensions — length, width, depth
  3. Instantly see cubic feet, cubic yards, and bags needed

Perfect for contractors, DIYers, and construction pros. All calculations happen in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

Features

  • Multiple shapes — slab, column, and footing modes
  • Unit conversion — feet/inches or meters/centimeters
  • Bag calculator — shows bags for 40lb, 60lb, 80lb, and 90lb mixes
  • Total weight — estimated weight of concrete needed
  • Instant results — updates as you type

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Get In Touch

Have a suggestion for a new tool? Found a bug? Want to collaborate? We’d love to hear from you.

Email: aashimkhn@protonmail.com

Response time: We typically respond within 24–48 hours.

Suggest a Tool

If there’s a tool you’d like to see on FreeToolz, send us an email with the subject “Tool Suggestion” and describe what you need. We’re always looking to add useful tools.

Report a Bug

Found something not working right? Please include:

item.title: Countdown Timer - Online Countdown to Date & Event Free
item.description:
How to Use the Countdown Timer

  1. Set a target date and time — pick any future date
  2. Give it a label — name your event (optional)
  3. Watch it count down — days, hours, minutes, seconds in real-time

Perfect for tracking deadlines, project milestones, vacations, events, or any special date you’re looking forward to.

Features

  • Real-time countdown — updates every second
  • Custom label — name your event
  • Large display — easy to read at a glance
  • Days/hours/min/sec — full breakdown
  • Auto-stops — pauses at zero with celebration message

item.title: CSS Minifier - Minify CSS Code Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the CSS Minifier

  1. Paste your CSS code in the input area
  2. Click Minify — instantly compresses your styles
  3. Copy the result — use the minified CSS anywhere

Minifying CSS removes whitespace, comments, and redundant formatting to reduce file size. Smaller CSS files mean faster page loads and better Core Web Vitals scores. All processing happens in your browser.

Features

  • Whitespace removal — strips spaces, tabs, newlines
  • Comment stripping — removes /* */ comments
  • Before/after comparison — see exact savings
  • Reduction percentage — track compression ratio
  • One-click copy — copy minified output instantly

item.title: Data Storage Converter - Free Online Data Size Converter
item.description:
How to Use the Data Storage Converter

  1. Enter value — type the data size you want to convert
  2. Select from unit — choose the source unit
  3. Select to unit — choose the target unit
  4. Get result — instant conversion

Perfect for IT, cloud storage planning, file size comparisons, and digital media.

Features

  • 10+ units — B, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB, and more
  • Binary & decimal — both standards supported
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Two-way — swap units for reverse conversion
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Date Difference Calculator - Days Between Dates Calculator Free
item.description:
How to Use the Date Difference Calculator

  1. Select start date — choose from the date picker
  2. Select end date — choose your target date
  3. View the difference — total days, months, years, and business days

Perfect for project planning, contract duration, countdowns to events, and calculating age or tenure.

Features

  • Total duration — years, months, days between dates
  • Business days — count weekdays (Mon-Fri) excluding weekends
  • Weekend days — total Saturdays and Sundays
  • Weeks + remainder — clean breakdown in weeks and days
  • Instant results — updates as you change dates

item.title: Discount Calculator - Free Online Discount Calculator
item.description:
How to Use the Discount Calculator

  1. Enter original price — full price of the item
  2. Enter discount % — percentage off
  3. Get results — sale price, savings amount, and discounted percentage

Perfect for shopping, budgeting, and finding the best deals.

Features

  • Sale price & savings — see exactly what you pay and save
  • Discount percentage — reverse-calculate discount from original and sale price
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: EMI Calculator - Calculate Loan EMI Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the EMI Calculator

  1. Enter loan amount — principal amount you want to borrow
  2. Set interest rate — annual interest rate percentage
  3. Choose tenure — loan duration in months
  4. Get EMI — instant monthly payment with total interest and schedule

Perfect for comparing loan offers, planning home or car purchases, and budgeting monthly payments.

Features

  • Real-time calculation — updates as you type
  • Amortization schedule — year-by-year principal and interest breakdown
  • Total cost view — total payment and total interest at a glance
  • All in your browser — no data sent anywhere

item.title: Flooring Calculator - Calculate Flooring Material Needed for Any Room
item.description:
How to Use the Flooring Calculator

  1. Enter room dimensions — length and width
  2. Set waste — 5-10% for straight, 15% for diagonal
  3. Get results — total area and material needed

Perfect for homeowners, contractors, and DIYers installing hardwood, laminate, vinyl, tile, or carpet. All calculations happen in your browser.

Features

  • Square footage/area — total flooring area needed
  • Waste allowance — customizable waste percentage
  • Box calculator — enter box coverage to get box count
  • Multiple shapes — rectangle and L-shaped rooms
  • Unit conversion — feet or meters

item.title: Fraction Calculator - Add, Subtract, Multiply, Divide Fractions Free
item.description:
How to Use the Fraction Calculator

  1. Enter two fractions — numerator and denominator for each
  2. Select operation — add, subtract, multiply, or divide
  3. Get instant result — simplified fraction with step-by-step

Perfect for students, teachers, and anyone working with fractions in cooking, construction, or education.

Features

  • Four operations — add, subtract, multiply, divide
  • Automatic simplification — result in lowest terms
  • Step-by-step — shows the work behind each calculation
  • Improper/mixed — displays both formats
  • Decimal equivalent — shows decimal value of the result

item.title: Hash Generator - Generate MD5, SHA1, SHA256 Hashes Online Free
item.description:
How to Generate Hashes

  1. Type or paste your text in the input box
  2. View hashes for MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512
  3. Copy any hash with one click

All hashing is done in your browser using the Web Crypto API. Your data never leaves your device.

Features

  • MD5 hash — 128-bit hash
  • SHA-1 hash — 160-bit hash
  • SHA-256 hash — 256-bit hash
  • SHA-512 hash — 512-bit hash
  • Real-time — hashes update as you type
  • Copy any hash — one-click clipboard copy

item.title: Heading Analyzer - Free Online Heading Structure Checker
item.description:
How to Use the Heading Analyzer

  1. Paste your content — HTML or plain text with headings
  2. View heading structure — see H1-H6 hierarchy
  3. Check issues — duplicate H1s, skipped levels, missing headings

Perfect for SEO content audits, accessibility checks, and content optimization.

Features

  • Full heading extraction — finds all H1-H6 tags
  • Hierarchy visualization — see heading nesting at a glance
  • Issue detection — duplicate H1s, skipped levels, missing top-level headings
  • Word count per heading — see length of each heading
  • Real-time — updates as you paste
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: HTML Minifier - Minify HTML Code Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the HTML Minifier

  1. Paste your HTML code in the input area
  2. Click Minify — instantly compresses your code
  3. Copy the result — use the minified HTML anywhere

Minifying HTML removes unnecessary whitespace, comments, and line breaks to reduce file size. Smaller files load faster, improving page speed and SEO. All processing happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

Features

  • Whitespace removal — strips spaces, tabs, and newlines
  • Comment stripping — removes HTML comments
  • Character count — see before/after size comparison
  • Save percentage — see how much you compressed
  • One-click copy — copy minified output instantly

item.title: HTML Sitemap Generator - Free Online HTML Sitemap Tool
item.description:
How to Use the HTML Sitemap Generator

  1. Enter site name — your website name
  2. Add links — enter URL and label pairs, organized by group
  3. Copy the HTML — grab the complete HTML sitemap code

Perfect for adding a user-facing sitemap page to your website.

Features

  • Grouped links — organize by category/section
  • Beautiful output — clean HTML structure with nested lists
  • Add/remove links — dynamic link management
  • One-click copy — grab the complete HTML
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Image Resizer - Resize Images Online Free
item.description:
In a digital world driven by visuals, having the right image size for your blog, social media, or website is critical. The FreeToolz Image Resizer is a professional-grade, browser-based utility that allows you to adjust the dimensions of your photos instantly. Unlike traditional online converters that require you to upload your files to their servers, our tool processes everything on your local machine, ensuring maximum speed and absolute privacy.

How the Image Resizer Works (Technical Breakdown)

Our Image Resizer leverages the power of modern web standards to perform complex image manipulation without a backend server. Here is how the magic happens:

item.title: JS Minifier - Minify JavaScript Code Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the JS Minifier

  1. Paste your JavaScript code in the input area
  2. Click Minify — instantly compresses your code
  3. Copy the result — use the minified JS anywhere

Minifying JavaScript removes whitespace, comments, and line breaks to reduce file size. Smaller scripts load faster and improve page performance. All processing happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

Features

  • Whitespace removal — strips spaces, tabs, newlines
  • Comment stripping — removes // and /* */ comments
  • Before/after comparison — see exact savings
  • Reduction percentage — track compression ratio
  • One-click copy — copy minified output instantly

item.title: JSON Formatter - Format, Validate & Beautify JSON Online
item.description:
The FreeToolz JSON Formatter is a powerful, developer-centric utility designed to transform messy, unreadable JSON strings into perfectly indented, human-readable structures. Whether you are debugging an API response, cleaning up a configuration file, or validating the syntax of your data, this tool provides an instant, browser-based solution without the need for heavy IDEs or privacy-risking cloud uploads.

How the JSON Formatter Works

Technically, the JSON Formatter leverages the native JavaScript engine within your browser. When you paste a string into the input field, the tool performs the following steps:

item.title: Keyword Density Checker - Free Online Keyword Analysis Tool
item.description:
How to Use the Keyword Density Checker

  1. Paste or type your content in the text area
  2. View instant analysis — word count, character count, keyword density
  3. Explore n-grams — see 2-word and 3-word phrase frequencies

Perfect for SEO writers, content editors, and bloggers optimizing for search.

Features

  • Keyword frequency table — sorted by density percentage
  • Word & character count — total content stats
  • 2-gram & 3-gram analysis — common phrase detection
  • Stop word filtering — ignores common English stop words
  • Real-time — updates as you type or paste
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Length Converter - Free Online Length Conversion Tool
item.description:
How to Use the Length Converter

  1. Enter value — type the number you want to convert
  2. Select from unit — choose the source unit
  3. Select to unit — choose the target unit
  4. Get result — instant conversion

Perfect for construction, travel, education, and everyday measurements.

Features

  • 12+ units — mm, cm, m, km, in, ft, yd, mi, nautical mile, and more
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Two-way — swap units for reverse conversion
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: List Randomizer - Shuffle List & Pick Random Item Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the List Randomizer

  1. Enter items — one per line in the text area
  2. Choose action — shuffle all items or pick a random one
  3. See results — shuffled list or random pick displayed instantly

Perfect for contest winners, random selections, team assignments, study order, and fairness in decision-making.

Features

  • Shuffle mode — randomize the entire list order
  • Pick mode — select one random item from the list
  • Multiple picks — pick N random items at once
  • Easy editing — paste from spreadsheet or type directly
  • Visual shuffle animation — shows items being randomized

item.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator - Generate Dummy Text Online Free
item.description:
How to Use Lorem Ipsum Generator

  1. Choose mode — generate by words, sentences, or paragraphs
  2. Set quantity — how many you want
  3. Copy — one click to clipboard

Perfect for web designers, developers, and content creators who need placeholder text for layouts and mockups.

Features

  • Three modes — words, sentences, or paragraphs
  • Flexible count — generate exactly what you need
  • Classic Lorem Ipsum — standard dummy text
  • One-click copy — copy generated text instantly
  • Responsive — works on any device

item.title: MAC Address Lookup - OUI Vendor Lookup Tool Free
item.description:
How to Use the MAC Lookup

  1. Enter a MAC address — e.g. 00:1A:2B:3C:4D:5E or 00-1A-2B-3C-4D-5E
  2. View the vendor — the manufacturer name is displayed instantly
  3. Search history — recent lookups shown for reference

Perfect for network administrators, IT support, and security professionals identifying devices on their network.

Features

  • Instant vendor lookup — identifies the manufacturer from the OUI
  • Flexible input — accepts colons, hyphens, or no separators
  • Case insensitive — accepts uppercase or lowercase hex
  • Built-in database — thousands of OUIs bundled (no external API needed)
  • Recent lookups — shows your last few searches

item.title: Markdown Editor - Write & Preview Markdown Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Markdown Editor

  1. Type markdown in the left editor panel
  2. See live preview update instantly on the right
  3. Copy HTML or download your markdown

All processing happens in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

Features

  • Live preview — see formatted output as you type
  • Split view — editor and preview side by side
  • Supports — headings, bold, italic, links, images, code, lists, tables, blockquotes
  • Copy HTML — get the rendered HTML
  • 100% free — no signup required

item.title: Mass Converter - Free Online Weight Conversion Tool
item.description:
How to Use the Mass Converter

  1. Enter value — type the number you want to convert
  2. Select from unit — choose the source unit
  3. Select to unit — choose the target unit
  4. Get result — instant conversion

Perfect for cooking, fitness, shipping, and science.

Features

  • 10+ units — mg, g, kg, t, lb, oz, st, and more
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Two-way — swap units for reverse conversion
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Meta Tag Generator - Free Online SEO Meta Tags Generator
item.description:
How to Use the Meta Tag Generator

  1. Fill in your page details — title, description, keywords, URL, site name
  2. Customize OG & Twitter — Open Graph and Twitter Card tags auto-generate
  3. Copy the HTML — click copy to grab ready-to-use meta tags

Perfect for SEO professionals, content publishers, and web developers.

Features

  • Complete meta set — title, description, keywords, viewport, charset
  • Open Graph tags — og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type
  • Twitter Cards — twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description
  • Live preview — see how your snippet looks in search results
  • One-click copy — copy all tags as HTML
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Paint Calculator - Estimate Paint Gallons Needed for Any Room
item.description:
How to Use the Paint Calculator

  1. Enter room dimensions — length, width, and height
  2. Subtract openings — number of windows and doors
  3. Choose coats — 1 or 2 coats
  4. Get gallons — exact paint needed for walls, ceiling, and trim

Perfect for homeowners, painters, and contractors planning interior painting projects. All calculations are done in your browser.

Features

  • Walls, ceiling, and trim — separate estimates for each
  • Door/window subtraction — subtracts standard sizes
  • Multiple coats — automatically doubles for 2 coats
  • Gallon precision — rounds up to nearest gallon
  • Waste allowance — includes 10% buffer

item.title: Password Generator - Create Strong Random Passwords Online Free
item.description:
In an era of increasing cyber threats and data breaches, your first line of defense is a strong, unique password. The FreeToolz Password Generator is a professional-grade utility designed to create cryptographically secure, random passwords that are virtually impossible to crack using brute-force methods. By generating passwords locally in your browser, we ensure that your credentials never touch the internet until you use them.

How the Password Generator Works (Technical Details)

Most simple password generators use Math.random(), which is a “pseudo-random” number generator that is not suitable for cryptographic purposes. At FreeToolz, we utilize the Web Crypto API, specifically the window.crypto.getRandomValues() method.

item.title: Password Strength Checker - Test Password Security Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Password Strength Checker

  1. Type a password — the analysis updates in real-time
  2. View strength — visual meter from Weak to Very Strong
  3. Read feedback — suggestions to improve your password

All analysis happens locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server or stored anywhere.

Features

  • Real-time analysis — updates as you type
  • Strength meter — visual indicator with color coding
  • Character breakdown — uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols
  • Length analysis — minimum length requirements
  • Entropy calculation — bits of entropy estimate
  • Common patterns — detects sequential, repeated, common passwords
  • Improvement tips — actionable suggestions

item.title: Percentage Calculator - Calculate Percentages Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Percentage Calculator

  1. Choose mode — what is X% of Y, what % is X of Y, or % change
  2. Enter values — fill in the two numbers
  3. Get result — instant percentage calculation

Perfect for shopping discounts, tax calculations, grade scores, tip amounts, and data analysis.

Features

  • Three modes — find percentage, find what % one number is of another, calculate % change
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Copy results — one-click copy
  • Formula display — shows the calculation formula
  • All in your browser — no data sent anywhere

item.title: Percentage Calculator - Calculate Percentages Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Percentage Calculator

  1. Choose a calculation type — 3 common scenarios
  2. Enter your numbers
  3. Get instant results — with formula shown

All calculations are done in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.

Features

  • What is X% of Y? — find the percentage of a number
  • X is what % of Y? — find the percentage relationship
  • What is the % change? — calculate increase or decrease
  • Instant results — updates as you type
  • Copy results — one-click to clipboard

item.title: PoE Calculator - Power over Ethernet Budget Calculator Free
item.description:
How to Use the PoE Calculator

  1. Add PoE devices — select quantity and PoE class for each device type
  2. Enter switch PoE budget — total power available from your PoE switch
  3. View results — total power draw, remaining budget, and recommendations

Perfect for security installers, network technicians, and system integrators planning PoE infrastructure for IP cameras and access points.

Features

  • PoE classes — supports Class 1 (4W) through Class 4 (30W PoE+)
  • Power budget analysis — total draw vs switch capacity
  • Overbudget warnings — alerts when power exceeds capacity
  • Multiple device types — cameras, access points, and other PoE devices
  • Cable length impact — estimates power loss over distance

item.title: Port Number Lookup - Common TCP/UDP Ports Reference Free
item.description:
How to Use the Port Lookup

  1. Search by port number — type a number (e.g. 80, 443, 22)
  2. Or search by service name — type “HTTP”, “SSH”, “DNS”
  3. Browse the table — scroll through common ports with descriptions

Perfect for network administrators, firewall configurators, CCTV installers setting up remote access, and IT professionals.

Features

  • Quick search — filter by port number or service name
  • Well-known ports — 0-1023 with official assignments
  • Registered ports — common services above 1024
  • CCTV-specific — includes common surveillance ports (RTSP, ONVIF, HTTP for cameras)
  • Color-coded — well-known, registered, and dynamic ports visually distinguished

item.title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator - Estimate Due Date Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Due Date Calculator

  1. Choose method — LMP (last menstrual period) or conception date
  2. Enter the date — pick your LMP or conception date
  3. Get results — estimated due date, current week, and trimester

Calculate your estimated due date and track your pregnancy progress week by week. All calculations stay in your browser.

Features

  • LMP method — standard 280-day calculation
  • Conception method — if you know the conception date
  • Current pregnancy week — see how far along
  • Trimester info — current trimester and key milestones
  • Key dates — important milestones calculator

item.title: Prime Number Checker - Check if a Number is Prime Free
item.description:
How to Use the Prime Checker

  1. Enter a number — type any integer
  2. See if it’s prime — instantly check primality
  3. Explore more — view prime factors, next prime, and nearby primes

Perfect for students, mathematicians, and programmers working with number theory or cryptography concepts.

Features

  • Primality test — instant check for any number
  • Prime factorization — shows all prime factors
  • Next prime — find the next prime number
  • Previous prime — find the previous prime
  • Prime range — list all primes up to a given limit
  • Divisors — shows all divisors of the number

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Introduction

FreeToolz (“we,” “our,” or “us”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website at freetoolz.in.

Information We Collect

No User Accounts

FreeToolz does not require user accounts. All tools run entirely in your browser — no data is sent to our servers.

Automatically Collected Information

Like most websites, we automatically collect certain information when you visit:

item.title: QR Code Generator - Create Free QR Codes Online
item.description: QR codes have become an essential part of the modern digital landscape, bridging the gap between physical and digital worlds. The FreeToolz QR Code Generator is a fast, secure, and completely free utility that allows you to create high-quality QR codes for URLs, contact information, Wi-Fi credentials, or plain text. Unlike many “freemium” services that charge for downloads or use tracking redirects, our tool provides direct, permanent QR codes with no strings attached.

item.title: RAID Storage Calculator - RAID 0/1/5/6/10 Capacity Calculator Free
item.description:
How to Use the RAID Calculator

  1. Select RAID level — choose from RAID 0, 1, 5, 6, or 10
  2. Enter number of drives — minimum varies by RAID type
  3. Enter drive capacity — in TB (Terabytes)
  4. View results instantly — usable capacity, fault tolerance, and read/write characteristics

Perfect for system administrators, CCTV installers, and IT professionals planning storage for NVRs and servers.

Features

  • All RAID levels — supports RAID 0, 1, 5, 6, and 10
  • Real-time calculation — updates as you change inputs
  • Fault tolerance — shows how many drives can fail
  • Performance notes — read/write characteristics per RAID type
  • Minimum drive requirements — validates configuration

item.title: Rebar Calculator - Calculate Rebar Length, Quantity & Weight
item.description:
How to Use the Rebar Calculator

  1. Enter slab dimensions — length and width
  2. Set spacing — horizontal and vertical grid spacing
  3. Choose rebar size — from #3 (10mm) to #8 (25mm)
  4. Get results — number of bars, total length, and weight

Perfect for contractors, engineers, and construction estimators. All calculations happen in your browser.

Features

  • Bidirectional grid — calculates both directions
  • Multiple rebar sizes — #3 through #8 (metric too)
  • Weight estimate — total rebar weight in lbs or kg
  • Unit conversion — feet/inches or meters
  • Overlap allowance — accounts for lap splices

item.title: Robots.txt Generator - Free Online Robots.txt File Generator
item.description:
How to Use the Robots.txt Generator

  1. Add rules — specify user-agent, allow/disallow paths, crawl delay
  2. Add sitemap URL — optional sitemap reference
  3. Copy the output — ready-to-paste robots.txt content

Perfect for SEO professionals, web developers, and site owners.

Features

  • Multi-user-agent — separate rules for different crawlers
  • Allow/Disallow rules — granular path control
  • Crawl delay — set crawl rate limits
  • Sitemap reference — link to your XML sitemap
  • One-click copy — grab the complete robots.txt
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: ROI Calculator - Return on Investment Calculator Free
item.description:
How to Use the ROI Calculator

  1. Enter initial investment — amount you invested
  2. Enter final value — current or expected value
  3. Add time period — number of years (optional)
  4. Get results — total profit, ROI percentage, and annualized ROI

Perfect for evaluating stocks, real estate, business projects, and marketing campaigns.

Features

  • Profit & ROI — see both total gain and percentage return
  • Annualized ROI — compare investments across different time periods
  • Real-time calculation — updates as you type
  • All in your browser — no data sent anywhere

item.title: Roofing Calculator - Estimate Shingles, Squares & Materials
item.description:
How to Use the Roofing Calculator

  1. Enter roof dimensions — length and width of each roof plane
  2. Set roof pitch — rise in inches per 12 inches of run
  3. Get materials — squares, shingle bundles, underlayment, cap

Perfect for roofing contractors, homeowners planning a replacement, and material estimators. All calculations run in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

Features

  • Roof pitch adjustment — accounts for slope factor
  • Squares calculation — industry standard (1 square = 100 sq ft)
  • Bundle count — estimates based on 3 bundles per square
  • Underlayment — #15 felt roll count
  • Ridge cap — linear feet of cap shingles
  • Waste allowance — automatically adds 10%

item.title: Security System Cost Estimator - Get Equipment Pricing Free
item.description:
Planning a security system installation? The FreeToolz Security System Cost Estimator gives you a professional itemized quote for complete surveillance systems. Enter your camera requirements, storage needs, and infrastructure preferences to get an accurate equipment cost estimate instantly.

Whether you’re a homeowner securing your property, a business owner installing an office system, or a security professional preparing a client quote, this estimator covers everything — cameras, NVR, PoE switches, hard drives, UPS backup, cabling, and installation.

item.title: Sitemap Generator - Free Online XML Sitemap Generator
item.description:
How to Use the Sitemap Generator

  1. Enter base URL — your website URL
  2. List your page URLs — one per line (path or full URL)
  3. Set options — default priority, changefreq, lastmod date
  4. Copy the XML — grab your complete sitemap

Perfect for SEO professionals launching or updating websites.

Features

  • Per-URL customization — set priority and changefreq per page
  • Auto URL resolution — shorthand paths auto-expand with base URL
  • XML format — generates valid sitemap XML
  • One-click copy — grab the complete XML output
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Speed Converter - Free Online Speed Conversion Tool
item.description:
How to Use the Speed Converter

  1. Enter value — type the speed you want to convert
  2. Select from unit — choose the source unit
  3. Select to unit — choose the target unit
  4. Get result — instant conversion

Perfect for driving, aviation, sailing, and sports.

Features

  • 8+ units — km/h, mph, m/s, knots, mach, ft/s, and more
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Two-way — swap units for reverse conversion
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: SQL Formatter - Format SQL Queries Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the SQL Formatter

  1. Paste your SQL query in the input area
  2. Choose indentation — 2 or 4 spaces
  3. Click Format — instantly beautifies your SQL

Well-formatted SQL is easier to read, debug, and maintain. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOIN, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, and common DDL statements.

Features

  • Keyword uppercase — formats SQL keywords for readability
  • Smart indentation — aligns columns and clauses
  • Custom spacing — choose 2 or 4 space indentation
  • Error detection — identify syntax issues
  • One-click copy — copy formatted SQL instantly

item.title: Stair Calculator - Calculate Stair Rise, Run, and Stringer Length
item.description:
How to Use the Stair Calculator

  1. Enter total rise — floor-to-floor height
  2. Adjust target riser height — optimal is 7 inches
  3. Set tread depth — minimum 10 inches
  4. Get results — number of steps, stringer length, total run

Perfect for builders, contractors, and DIY staircase construction. Follows standard 7-11 stair guidelines. All calculations in your browser.

Features

  • Building code compliant — follows IRC 7" max riser, 10" min tread
  • Stringer length — exact cut length for stringers
  • Headroom check — warns if clearance is low
  • Unit conversion — inches or centimeters
  • Printable results — clear breakdown of all measurements

item.title: Subnet Calculator - IP CIDR Network Calculator Free
item.description:
How to Use the Subnet Calculator

  1. Enter an IP address — e.g. 192.168.1.0
  2. Enter CIDR prefix — e.g. 24 (or use netmask format like 255.255.255.0)
  3. View results instantly — network address, broadcast, usable range, total hosts, and wildcard mask

Perfect for network engineers, system administrators, CCTV installers, and IT professionals planning IP networks for surveillance systems.

Features

  • Instant calculation — updates as you type
  • CIDR notation — supports prefixes from /0 to /32
  • Complete details — network address, broadcast, first/last usable IP, total hosts
  • Subnet mask — both dotted decimal and CIDR
  • Wildcard mask — useful for ACLs and routing protocols

item.title: Temperature Converter - Free Online Temperature Conversion
item.description:
How to Use the Temperature Converter

  1. Enter value — type the temperature you want to convert
  2. Select from unit — Celsius, Fahrenheit, or Kelvin
  3. Select to unit — choose the target scale
  4. Get result — instant conversion

Perfect for cooking, weather, science, and travel.

Features

  • Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin — all three temperature scales
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Two-way — swap units for reverse conversion
  • Boiling & freezing points — reference table included
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Text Diff Checker - Compare Text Differences Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Text Diff Checker

  1. Paste original text in the left box
  2. Paste changed text in the right box
  3. See differences highlighted — added, removed, and unchanged text

All processing happens in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

Features

  • Side-by-side comparison — see both versions at once
  • Color-coded diff — green for additions, red for removals
  • Inline diff — character-level difference detection
  • 100% private — everything runs in your browser

item.title: Timestamp Converter - Convert Unix Timestamp to Date Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Timestamp Converter

  1. Enter a Unix timestamp to see the human-readable date
  2. Or pick a date to get the Unix timestamp
  3. Copy either value with one click

All conversions are done locally in your browser.

Features

  • Timestamp to date — convert Unix seconds to readable date/time
  • Date to timestamp — convert any date to Unix seconds
  • Current timestamp — get the current Unix time
  • Multiple formats — UTC and local time display
  • One-click copy — copy any value to clipboard

item.title: Timezone Converter - Convert Time Between Timezones Free
item.description:
How to Use the Timezone Converter

  1. Select source timezone — e.g. your local time or Asia/Qatar
  2. Enter the time — choose hours and minutes
  3. Select target timezone — e.g. US/Eastern or Asia/Dubai
  4. View converted time — instantly see the equivalent time

Perfect for remote teams, international meetings, travel planning, and coordinating with clients across timezones.

Features

  • Major timezones — covers all major world timezones
  • UTC/GMT offsets — shows offset for each timezone
  • City-based — common cities for easy selection
  • Reverse swap — swap source and target with one click
  • DST-aware — adjusts for daylight saving where applicable

item.title: Tip Calculator - Free Online Tip & Bill Split Calculator
item.description:
How to Use the Tip Calculator

  1. Enter bill amount — total bill before tip
  2. Choose tip % — percentage or custom amount
  3. Split between — how many people
  4. Get results — tip per person, total per person, and grand total

Perfect for restaurants, group outings, and service calculations.

Features

  • Per-person split — divide tip and total evenly
  • Quick tip presets — 10%, 15%, 18%, 20%, 25%
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Unit Converter - Convert Length, Weight, Temperature Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Unit Converter

  1. Select a category — length, weight, temperature, area, or volume
  2. Enter a value in any unit
  3. See conversions to all other units instantly

All calculations are done in your browser. No data is sent anywhere.

Features

  • Multiple categories — length, weight, temperature, area, volume
  • Instant conversion — results update as you type
  • Many units per category — meters, feet, inches, km, miles, and more
  • Temperature — Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin
  • 100% free — no signup, no limits

item.title: UPS Runtime Calculator - Backup Power for Security Systems Free
item.description:
How to Use the UPS Runtime Calculator

  1. Enter equipment power — NVR power consumption in watts
  2. Add camera power — number of cameras and wattage each
  3. Enter switch power — PoE switch consumption in watts
  4. See results — total load, UPS recommendations, and runtime estimates

Perfect for security system designers, facility managers, and integrators planning backup power for surveillance systems.

Features

  • Total load calculation — sum of all connected equipment
  • UPS sizing — recommended VA rating based on total load
  • Runtime estimates — backup time at various UPS capacities
  • Common UPS sizes — 500VA through 3000VA
  • Safety margin — recommends 20-30% headroom

item.title: URL Encoder/Decoder - Encode & Decode URLs Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the URL Encoder/Decoder

  1. Type or paste text in the input area
  2. Click Encode to URL-encode or Decode to URL-decode
  3. Copy the result with one click

All processing happens in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.

Features

  • URL Encode — convert special characters to %XX format
  • URL Decode — convert %XX codes back to readable text
  • One-click copy — copy result to clipboard
  • 100% private — everything runs in your browser

item.title: UUID Generator - Generate UUID v4 & v7 Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the UUID Generator

  1. Select UUID version — v4 (random) or v7 (time-ordered)
  2. Choose quantity — generate 1 to 100 UUIDs at once
  3. Copy — click copy on any UUID or use “Copy All”

Perfect for developers needing unique identifiers for databases, APIs, distributed systems, and testing.

Features

  • UUID v4 — random UUIDs (cryptographically secure)
  • UUID v7 — time-ordered UUIDs (DB index-friendly)
  • Bulk generation — up to 100 at once
  • Copy individual — click any UUID to copy
  • Copy all — copy entire list at once
  • Uppercase option — toggle uppercase hex

item.title: Volume Converter - Free Online Volume Conversion Tool
item.description:
How to Use the Volume Converter

  1. Enter value — type the volume you want to convert
  2. Select from unit — choose the source unit
  3. Select to unit — choose the target unit
  4. Get result — instant conversion

Perfect for cooking, chemistry, shipping, and liquid measurement.

Features

  • 12+ units — mL, L, m³, gal, qt, pt, cup, fl oz, tbsp, and more
  • Real-time — updates as you type
  • Two-way — swap units for reverse conversion
  • No data sent — everything runs locally

item.title: Water Intake Calculator - Daily Water Intake Based on Weight
item.description:
How to Use the Water Intake Calculator

  1. Enter your weight — in pounds or kilograms
  2. Select activity level — how much you exercise
  3. Choose climate — adjust for hot weather
  4. Get your target — daily water intake in oz or liters

Proper hydration is essential for health, energy, and performance. This calculator gives you a personalized daily water goal based on your body and lifestyle.

Features

  • Weight-based formula — scientific hydration guidelines
  • Activity adjustment — replaces fluids lost through sweat
  • Climate adjustment — more water in hot/humid conditions
  • Multiple units — ounces, cups, liters, milliliters
  • Daily reminders — suggested drinking schedule

item.title: Word Counter - Count Words, Characters & Sentences Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the Word Counter

  1. Type or paste your text in the input box
  2. Watch live counts update as you type — words, characters, sentences, paragraphs
  3. Copy or clear with one click

Perfect for students, writers, SEO professionals, and anyone who needs accurate word and character counts. No data is saved — everything stays in your browser.

Features

  • Real-time counting — updates instantly as you type
  • Character count — both with and without spaces
  • Sentence & paragraph count — understand your text structure
  • Reading time — estimated minutes to read
  • Speaking time — estimated time to speak
  • Top keywords — most frequent words in your text

item.title: YAML to JSON Converter - Convert YAML to JSON Online Free
item.description:
How to Use the YAML ↔ JSON Converter

  1. Paste your YAML or JSON in the input area
  2. Select direction — YAML → JSON or JSON → YAML
  3. Click Convert — instant bidirectional conversion

Useful for API configuration, Docker Compose files, Kubernetes manifests, and any project that needs to switch between YAML and JSON formats.

Features

  • Bidirectional — convert either direction
  • Auto-format — pretty-printed output
  • Color-coded — syntax highlighting
  • Error detection — see invalid input instantly
  • One-click copy — copy output in one click
